reasoning: 8x zoom inspection reveals a clear color bleed: pink/salmon pixels appear in and around the face mouth region that are foreign to the declared palette (dark browns, tans, gold). In hand-crafted pixel art every pixel color is intentional; stray hue is a classic AI diffusion artifact. The circular face outline shows variable pixel thickness — 1px in some arcs, 2px in others, with one gap — inconsistent with deliberate pixel art. The golden border sparkle/glow dots are unevenly distributed and several are clipped mid-pixel, suggesting sub-pixel placement that was rounded rather than snapped to the grid. Minor left-right asymmetry in border decoration. The face and button read semantically as a UI echo-button, so no semantic failure. Solid areas (interior fill, dark background) are clean with no noise. Overall: two clear AI tells (color bleed, outline inconsistency) plus two soft tells push this to marginal; not a clean pass.
